narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: That is one-fourth (economy) or one-half (premium) the global average per capita use of carbon per year. It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: By quantifying the flight's emissions as a fraction of an annual average and questioning the necessity of in-person attendance, the text minimizes the significance of the individual action in the context of the broader climate crisis, suggesting the concern is overblown.
